reviews.name: accounts/123/locations/456/reviews/fake_review_001
reviews.comment: Amazing service! The staff was incredibly friendly and professional. Will definitely come back.

reviews.name: accounts/123/locations/456/reviews/fake_review_002
reviews.comment: Terrible experience. I waited 45 minutes and nobody helped me. The manager was rude when I complained.

reviews.name: accounts/123/locations/456/reviews/fake_review_003
reviews.comment: Food was okay but the service was slow. Place was clean though.

reviews.name: accounts/123/locations/456/reviews/fake_review_004
reviews.comment: I got food poisoning after eating here. I've been sick for 3 days. This is a health hazard.

reviews.name: accounts/123/locations/456/reviews/fake_review_005
reviews.comment: Really good experience overall. Prices are fair and the quality is great.
